---
title: "mebart-demo"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{mebart-demo}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(meBART)
library(tidyverse)
library(latex2exp)
library(ggridges)
```

# Toy Example

$$f(x) = 1_{[0.5, \infty)}(x)$$

# Generate Synthetic Data

```{r}

# Fix random seed to make the results reproducible
set.seed(0)

# number of observations
n <- 100

# variance of measurement error and output, respectively
sigma_meas <- 0.1
sigma_y <- 0.1

# Generate x values uniformly and add measurement error
x_true <- runif(n, 0, 1)
x_meas <- x_true + rnorm(n, 0, sigma_meas)
y_true <- 1 * (x_true >= 0.5)
y_obs <- y_true + rnorm(n, 0, sigma_y)

# Convert to df
df_me <- data.frame(X=x_meas, y=y_obs)
df_no_me <- data.frame(X=x_true, y=y_obs)
```


# Plot 2 Different Datasets

```{r}

combined_df <- rbind(df_no_me, df_me)
combined_df <- cbind(combined_df, me = c(rep("No Measurement Error", n), rep("Measurement Error", n)))

combined_df$me <- factor(combined_df$me, levels = c("No Measurement Error", "Measurement Error"))


data_plot <- ggplot(combined_df) + 
    geom_point(aes(x = X, y = y), color="#619CFF") +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(me)) +
    labs(title = "Synthetic Data", x = "X", y = "Y") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-0.2, 1.2, 0.2)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-0.2, 1.2, 0.2)) +
    annotate("segment", x = 0, xend = 0.5, y = 0, yend = 0, linetype = "solid") +
    annotate("segment", x = 0.5, xend = 1, y = 1, yend = 1, linetype = "solid") +
    annotate("point", x = 0.5, y = 0, size = 3, shape = 1) +
    annotate("point", x = 0.5, y = 1, size = 3, shape = 16) +
    
    coord_fixed(ratio=1)

data_plot


# ggsave("./figures/data_plot.png")

```
